$comment: Tier-2 DB-state fixture spec for the `files` repo (Phase-2). One committed
file drives BOTH sides of the differential:
- the v4 oracle (build-files-fixture.ts + files-tier2.ts) and
- the Rust port (quilltap-harness files tier-2 test).
files is the WIDEST repo to date (~23 columns). It carries the Taggable
lineage (user-scoped `userId` + a JSON `tags` array) and banks: a SECOND JSON
array column (`linkedTo`); a REAL number column (`size`) plus two NULLABLE
REAL columns (`width`, `height`); an OPTIONAL-NO-DEFAULT boolean (`isPlainText`
-> INTEGER 0/1 when present, SQL NULL when absent); enum TEXT columns
(`source`, `category`, `fileStatus`); a 64-char `sha256`; and a batch of
nullable string columns (generation*/description/projectId/folderPath/
storageKey).
isPlainText MODELING: the schema is `z.boolean().optional()` with NO default,
so an omitted value persists as SQL NULL (distinct from an explicit false/0).
Every corpus row sets it explicitly EXCEPT the 4th create (New Doc No PlainText),
which OMITS it to bank the absent -> NULL case.
fileStatus MODELING: `FileStatusEnum.default('ok').optional()`. Every corpus
row sets it explicitly ('ok'/'orphaned') so the Rust side can model it as a
required String, sidestepping the .default().optional() absent subtlety.
REAL float pass-through: `size` integer-valued REAL cells (e.g. 204800)
render back as JSON integers via js_number_to_json; `width`/`height` likewise.
SAFETY: testPepperBase64 is a THROWAWAY 32-byte key, the same one the
folders / tags / image_profiles fixtures use. It is NOT the real Friday pepper
and is safe to commit.
DETERMINISM: every id and timestamp is pinned, so both sides produce
byte-identical post-op state and the canonical dump needs ZERO normalization.

seed.generationRevisedPrompt: a vivid sunset over a calm ocean

ops.comment: Full new file: width/height set, isPlainText false, linkedTo + tags with ids, all generation* + description set, projectId/folderPath/storageKey set, category AVATAR, source IMPORTED, fileStatus 'ok'.

data.generationRevisedPrompt: a detailed portrait of a character

ops.comment: Minimal new file with nulls: width/height null, generation* null, projectId/folderPath/storageKey null, empty linkedTo + tags, category DOCUMENT, source UPLOADED, fileStatus 'ok', isPlainText true.
New file that OMITS isPlainText entirely -> banks the absent -> SQL NULL case. category EXPORT, source SYSTEM, fileStatus 'orphaned'.
Update seed row 1: set width/height (new dims), set description, replace the tags array. createdAt preserved, updatedAt pinned.
Update seed row 2: flip isPlainText true->false, flip fileStatus 'ok'->'orphaned'. updatedAt pinned.
